site.title: Full-Stack Engineer & Laravel Specialist
site.tagline: Building scalable web apps, APIs, and products with Laravel, Nuxt, and Python. Founder of IconMarvel.

paragraphs: I'm a Full-Stack Software Engineer based in Lahore, Pakistan, with 3+ years building scalable web applications, APIs, and backend systems. I specialize in Laravel, Nuxt.js, and Python-based services.

I've delivered production apps across POS, e-commerce, cab booking, trading, interpreting platforms, AI chatbots, and CMS — with a strong focus on system design, database architecture, and performance.
I'm also the founder of IconMarvel — a designer-first and developer-first icon platform combining AI search, SVG tools, APIs, Figma Plugin, NPM Package and CDN delivery.

highlights.title: Full-Stack Focus
highlights.desc: Laravel, Nuxt.js & Python with 3+ years shipping production systems.

highlights.title: API Architect
highlights.desc: RESTful APIs for SAAS, POS, Trading and Cab booking platforms.

highlights.title: System Design
highlights.desc: PostgreSQL & MySQL architecture, performance, and data integrity.

highlights.title: Product Builder
highlights.desc: Founder of IconMarvel — APIs, CDN, Docker & Cloudflare deployments.

points: Building and shipping full-stack web applications with Laravel, Nuxt.js, and modern deployment workflows.
Designing scalable APIs, database architecture, and performance-focused backend systems.
Working across the stack — from clean UI delivery to Dockerized deployments on VPS and Cloudflare.
Delivered production Laravel applications across POS, e-commerce, trading, and service platforms.
Built REST APIs, admin dashboards, and complex business logic with clean backend architecture.
Collaborated on features involving payments, reporting, inventory, and real-time user workflows.
Developed Laravel-based systems for booking, CMS, chat, and operational business domains.
Implemented dynamic frontends with JavaScript and jQuery alongside robust PHP backends.
Improved maintainability through structured modules, SQL optimization, and clean coding practices.

projects.title: IconMarvel
projects.description: Founder of a designer-first and developer-first icon platform: AI-powered search, SVG customization, CDN/NPM delivery, developer APIs, Figma plugin, and production-ready code export — unifying the full Search → Customize → Export → Integrate → Ship workflow.

projects.title: Financial Statement Generator
projects.description: Tool that automatically generates SECP-compliant financial documents — Balance Sheet, Profit & Loss, Cash Flow, Equity Statement, and Notes — required for company registration in Pakistan.

projects.title: ACT Ride Booking
projects.description: Ride-booking platform (inDriver-style) where admins/dispatchers create tasks for customers, drivers accept bookings, and a calendar shows driver availability and schedules.

projects.title: Prime Production
projects.description: Interpreting-service platform for booking interpreters and managing translation jobs, with dashboards for clients, vendors, and admins covering quotations and accounts.

projects.title: Vegetable Market POS
projects.description: Point-of-sale system for a vegetable market, handling complex sales, purchases, and money-management workflows.

projects.title: Trading Web Platform
projects.description: Trading features including profit/loss calculations, leverage handling, market data integration, and dashboards focused on core financial logic and UX.

projects.title: E-commerce Platform
projects.description: E-commerce system with sales, purchases, inventory management, and customer support modules built on Laravel.

projects.title: Custom AI Chatbot
projects.description: OpenAI-powered chatbot that handles payment queries and integrates third-party payment APIs for real-time customer information.
